Record Class TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult
Record Components:
leafNode - The leaf Node.
results - All found results.
condition - The condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
conditionString - The human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
termLabelName - The Name of the TermLabel to consider.
Enclosing class:
TruthValueTracingUtil
public static record TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult(Node leafNode, Map<String, TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult> results, JTerm condition, String conditionString, Name termLabelName) extends Record
Represents the unmodifiable predicate results of a leaf Node (Goal).

    • BranchResult

      public BranchResult(Node leafNode, Map<String, TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult> results, JTerm condition, String conditionString, Name termLabelName)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      leafNode - The leaf Node.
      results - All found results.
      condition - The condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
      conditionString - The human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
      termLabelName - The Name of the TermLabel to consider.

  • Method Details

    • results

      public Map<String, TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult> results()
      Returns all found results.
      Returns:
      All found results.

    • getResult

      public TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult getResult(FormulaTermLabel termLabel)
      Returns the TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult for the given FormulaTermLabel.
      Parameters:
      termLabel - The FormulaTermLabel.
      Returns:
      The found TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult or null if not available.

    • updateResult

      public void updateResult(FormulaTermLabel termLabel, TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult result)
      Updates a result.

      Warning: TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResults are considered to be unmodifiable. This means that an update of the result needs to be done before results are shown to the user by the UI.

      Parameters:
      termLabel - The FormulaTermLabel to update.
      result - The new result of the given FormulaTermLabel.

    • condition

      public JTerm condition()
      Returns the condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
      Returns:
      The condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.

      public String conditionString()
      Returns the human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
      Returns:
      The human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.

    • termLabelName

      public Name termLabelName()
      Returns the Name of the TermLabel to consider.
      Returns:
      The Name of the TermLabel to consider.

    • hasPredicateLabel

      public boolean hasPredicateLabel(JTerm term)
      Checks if the JTerm has a TermLabel with Name ().
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm to check.
      Returns:
      true has TermLabel, false do not has TermLabel.

    • getPredicateLabel

      public FormulaTermLabel getPredicateLabel(JTerm term)
      Returns the first FormulaTermLabel with Name ().
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm.
      Returns:
      The found FormulaTermLabel or null otherwise.

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
